zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Darcy於大約1313年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯塔林波洛時，她的父親Sir Robert Darcy44歲，母親Lady Joan FitzEustace28歲。她於1325年7月8日之後與John de Argentine結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1383年9月1日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾蕾托 維蒙德利享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可海萊斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Darcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Darcy was born about 1313, in Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir Robert Darcy, was 44 and her mother, Lady Joan FitzEustace, was 28. She married John de Argentine after 8 July 1325. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 1 September 1383, in Little Wymondley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Halesworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Darcy est née environ 1313, à Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Darcy, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan FitzEustace, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John de Argentine après 8 juillet 1325. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 septembre 1383, à Little Wymondley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Halesworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lei sposato John de Argentine dopo il 8 luglio 1325. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 settembre 1383, nel Little Wymondley, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Halesworth, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Darcyが約1313年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタリングボロウで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Darcyは44歳，母Lady Joan FitzEustaceは28歳であった。1325年7月8日以後にJohn de Argentineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1383年9月1日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアリットル ウイモンドリーで71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクヘイレスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Darcy(이)가 대략 1313년 영국 링코실르 스탤링버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Darcy(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joan FitzEustace(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1325년 7월 8일 이후 John de Argentine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1383년 9월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 리틀 윈이몽리에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 헤일스워스에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John de Argentine após 8 de julho de 1325. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1383, em Little Wymondley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Halesworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Darcy родилась около 1313 г. в местности сталлингбороую, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Darcy было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan FitzEustace, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Argentine после 8 июля 1325 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 1 сентября 1383 г. в местности литл вимондли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности хэлесворт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
